name: Fairview Indoor Golf Geneva
address: 1996 S Kirk Rd Suite 101, Geneva, IL 60134
about: Fairview Indoor Golf Geneva provides an authentic, year-round golf experience within the Fox Valley Ice Arena. The venue features 80+ courses and utilizes Full Swing golf simulator technology, recognized as the official licensee of The PGA TOUR and TPC Network of Courses. It offers a modern and relaxed atmosphere for golfers to enjoy the sport regardless of weather conditions. The on-site Rookies All American Pub & Grill provides a full menu of food and beverages, allowing customers to dine while they play. The facility is designed for both casual play and serious practice with league programs available, and operates with extended hours throughout the week.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 80+ iconic courses including official PGA TOUR and TPC Network venues like TPC Sawgrass
Realistic golf simulator software with high-detail graphics and continuous software updates
Convenient on-site food and beverage service provided by Rookies All American Pub & Grill
A modern, relaxed atmosphere for year-round play in any weather
Flexible hours and league programs for various playing preferences

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu provided by Rookies All American Pub & Grill located onsite
Full bar available through Rookies All American Pub & Grill

simulator_hardware.notes: Official licensee of The PGA TOUR and TPC Network of Courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if customers must bring their own. It's recommended to contact the venue directly for details on club rentals or requirements.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue provides a full menu of food and beverages through the on-site Rookies All American Pub & Grill.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the average time to complete 18 holes. For more detailed information on playing time, it's best to contact the venue directly or check their booking system.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with a casual atmosphere and is located within a sports complex (Fox Valley Ice Arena), making it suitable for families and younger golfers.
